test_strategy_covers_all_types.evidence: test-strategy.md covers unit (autodetect, config validation), integration (installer), content verification (documentation), backward compatibility, and error handling. Security and performance considerations documented in sections 6 and 7.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.evidence: 44 unique test case IDs across 4 test case spec files covering all 6 FRs (REQ-001 through REQ-006) and all 3 NFRs.

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: test-traceability-matrix.csv has 47 rows mapping all 14 acceptance criteria (AC-001-01 through AC-004-03) and all 3 NFRs to specific test cases. 100% AC coverage verified.

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: test-strategy.md section 2 defines targets: 100% branch coverage for autoDetectProvider(), 100% validation rules for YAML config, all 5 ACs for installer, guard clause invariant, and all 5 error codes.

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: test-data-plan.md covers 7 sections: env var configs, provider config objects, file system fixtures, mock HTTP server, script content data, expected patterns, and dependency constraints.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: test-strategy.md section 5 identifies 5 critical paths: tiered detection chain, installer selection, backward compat guard, health probe error handling, and fail-open behavior.

article_II.note: Tests designed before implementation (Phase 05 before Phase 06). Coverage targets: 100% branch for core logic, 100% AC coverage. Uses node:test exclusively.

article_VII.note: Traceability matrix maps all 14 AC and 3 NFRs to 44 test cases. AC IDs appear in test descriptions.

article_IX.note: All 6 gate checklist items validated and passed. No items bypassed or weakened.

article_XI.note: Integration tests use real file system (temp dirs). Health probe tests use in-process HTTP server. Content verification reads actual source files.
